extortion.description: sato.gr zoominfo.com/c/sato-sa/372140315 SATO is the leader in the office furniture market. In a tough and competitive market, SATO brand succeeds not only in maintaining but also in increasing its high market shares, since it offers its customers products and services that cover their most specific needs. Our main priority is to continuously improve our services and renew our products, in order to provide functional and modern solutions, while maintaining high quality and ergonomic standards, essential characteristics of the brand
